lighting_by_energy.low: barely-there deep plum wash with transparent cyber pink memory trace and dim silver-white edge

lighting_by_energy.medium: near-black crush with single cold white flicker, deep violet edge compression, no warm tones

lighting_by_energy.medium: soft diffused glow, muted desaturated edges, layered depth blur, gentle rim without hard contrast
lighting_by_energy.low: near-invisible diffused glow, edges dissolving into the background, depth all but gone, minimal rim trace

lighting_by_energy.high: maximum graphite compression with hair-thin focused beam, extreme rim shadow, zero ambient fill
lighting_by_energy.medium: sharp graphite contrast with narrow focused beam, hard rim shadow, no ambient fill, high compression
lighting_by_energy.low: controlled graphite contrast with steady narrow beam, firm rim shadow, minimal ambient fill
